round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Acknowledged other agents' findings (MUTCD, mobile homes, vegetation) to reinforce the conclusion, but did not add new linguistic evidence.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Acknowledged other agents' findings (vegetation, infrastructure) to reinforce the conclusion, but did not add new landscape evidence.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Acknowledged other agents' findings (linguistic, regulatory, landscape) to reinforce the conclusion, but did not add new botanical evidence.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Acknowledged other agents' findings (mobile homes, vegetation) to reinforce the conclusion, but did not add new regulatory evidence.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Acknowledged other agents' findings (linguistic, regulatory, botanical) to reinforce the conclusion, but did not add new meta evidence.

role_leakage_notes.linguistic: Minor leakage: Referenced MUTCD standards (regulatory) and mobile home architecture (meta/landscape) in R2.
role_leakage_notes.landscape: Minor leakage: Referenced vegetation (botanics) and infrastructure (regulatory/meta) in R2.
role_leakage_notes.botanics: Minor leakage: Referenced linguistic and regulatory evidence in R2.
role_leakage_notes.regulatory: Minor leakage: Referenced mobile home architecture (meta/landscape) in R2.
role_leakage_notes.meta: Minor leakage: Referenced linguistic and regulatory evidence in R2.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified absolute consensus across all five agents. The synthesis was concise and accurate, noting the lack of conflicting evidence and the alignment of all domains (linguistic, landscape, botanics, regulatory, meta) with the United States.
